ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in TWD */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the stock for the day */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry the company belongs to */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with this stock price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading day (e.g., Open, Closed, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., Senior Analyst, Junior Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the financial industry */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "trader_type" TEXT /* Type of trader (e.g., Retail, Institutional) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of trading account (e.g., Margin, Cash) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the trading account */,
  "trading_strategy" TEXT /* Preferred trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Price Drop, Price Rise) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Triggered, Inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Real-time) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who generated the report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Quarterly, Annual, Special) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's main findings */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the news to the financial market */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the news on stock prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Trader, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role associated with this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., can_view_reports, can_set_alerts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
